cases.prompt: 我们要做一个合同履约回款系统，帮我把业务需求梳理成标准需求文档。
cases.expected_signal: The skill should trigger for turning raw business needs into a structured software requirements document.

assertions.name: description-covers-requirement-exploration
assertions.expect: 需求探索|需求确认|软件需求文档|raw business needs|structured software requirements document
assertions.criteria: Frontmatter description must preserve positive trigger language for requirement exploration and document generation.

cases.prompt: 帮我设计一个合同列表页面，要有筛选框、按钮布局和交互动效。
cases.expected_signal: The skill should not treat UI-only design as an in-scope requirements exploration task.

assertions.name: ui-boundary-present
assertions.expect: Exclude UI/UX layout|translate them into business actions|interface design belongs to a later phase
assertions.criteria: The skill must preserve the boundary that UI-only requests are out of scope or should be translated to business actions.

cases.notes: Guards against over-triggering on adjacent UI design work.

cases.prompt: 探索一个开票审批系统，需要区分哪些内容你能自动补全、哪些必须问我确认。
cases.expected_signal: The skill must retain the A/B classification rule and B-class mandatory confirmation list.

assertions.name: ab-classification-present
assertions.expect: A class|B class|manual approval|synchronous waiting or asynchronous triggering|Data visibility ranges
assertions.criteria: The skill must distinguish common assumptions from enterprise-specific facts that require confirmation.

cases.notes: Protects the highest-risk reasoning rule in the skill.

cases.prompt: 在没有后端草稿保存工具的环境里，继续做需求探索。
cases.expected_signal: The skill should not pretend unavailable tools were called and should maintain a Markdown draft with manual checks.

assertions.name: tool-fallback-present
assertions.expect: If tools with these exact capabilities are available|do not pretend tool calls occurred|Maintain the draft as Markdown|manual completeness check
assertions.criteria: Tool usage rules must support graceful fallback when requirement-service tools are unavailable.

assertions.name: system-fragment-tool-boundary-present
assertions.expect: 工具使用边界|如当前环境提供|不要假装已调用工具|手工执行完整性自检
assertions.criteria: The loaded prompt fragment must preserve the fallback boundary instead of hard-requiring unavailable tools.

cases.notes: Regression for the tool-call conflict found during evaluation.

cases.prompt: 请生成最终需求文档，要求结构完整、编号可交叉引用，并包含流程图。
cases.expected_signal: The skill should produce the six-part Markdown contract with ID schemes and Mermaid diagrams.

assertions.name: document-contract-present
assertions.expect: Scenario and process descriptions|Business function descriptions|Business object descriptions|Role descriptions|Appendix A|Appendix B|OBJ-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}|FUNC-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}|RULE-{DOMAIN}-{NNN}|Mermaid
assertions.criteria: The skill must preserve the document structure, ID patterns, and Mermaid requirement.

cases.prompt: 最终交付前，请检查这份需求文档是否完整。
cases.expected_signal: The skill should run or manually perform the completeness checklist before calling the document complete.

assertions.name: completion-check-present
assertions.expect: Before calling a requirements document complete|Every process has ordered steps|Every core document explicitly says whether it needs approval|Every referenced rule has a standalone RULE definition|Appendix B has no unresolved B-class item
assertions.criteria: The skill must retain the final completeness gate.

cases.prompt: 检查 legacy manifest 是否会让 Codex 误以为必须使用特定模型或数据库。
cases.expected_signal: The legacy manifest should explicitly mark runtime hints as legacy-only and avoid hard model/database requirements for Codex.

assertions.name: legacy-runtime-marked
assertions.expect: legacyOnly|Codex 使用本技能时不要求特定模型|如缺少 capability/tools.yaml 中定义的后端工具，应改用 Markdown 草稿和手工完整性自检
assertions.criteria: Legacy runtime metadata must be clearly non-authoritative for Codex.

cases.notes: Regression for the old platform runtime assumption.
